explanatory_only_diagnostics: Deferred learned-OT residual row records an evidence gap only.
No teacher quality, student quality, posterior quality, or method failure claim is supported.

envelope_tags.reason: No approved teacher/student artifact with provenance was available.

mcse_or_interval.summary: Not applicable because IE6 deferred before residual execution; no stochastic output was produced.

non_implication: IE6 learned-OT diagnostics were deferred because no approved pre-existing teacher/student artifact with provenance was available. This deferral does not validate or invalidate learned OT, neural OT, surrogate-map quality, posterior quality, production bayesfilter code, banking use, model-risk use, or production readiness.
post_run_red_team_note: The strongest reason not to over-read IE6 is that a clean deferral records only the absence of an approved teacher/student artifact. It says nothing about whether learned OT would pass or fail under a provenance-bearing artifact.
